description: Configure the Drupal Commerce store to support digital products by creating a data model for downloadable files without shipping. Create a 'File Formats' taxonomy vocabulary (machine name: file_formats) containing terms PDF, ePub, and MOBI. Establish a non-shippable 'Digital Variation' product variation type (machine name: digital_variation) featuring a 'Download File' file field (machine name: field_download_file, extensions: pdf, epub, mobi, zip) and a 'File Format' entity reference field (machine name: field_file_format) referencing the 'File Formats' vocabulary. Create a 'Digital Product' product type (machine name: digital_product) that uses the 'Digital Variation' variation type. Starting state: Logged in as admin at the Commerce Configuration page.
